pi_items.source: Web search confirmed quotes.toscrape.com is a real, public website designed as an educational sandbox for web scraping practice. Accessible and operational.
Consistent with target_url. Web search verified this is a real domain hosting the Quotes to Scrape website.
Path verified in task scripts: setup_task.sh (line 17), export_result.sh (line 10). Both task-level scripts explicitly reference this directory for output collection.

Web search and documentation verify quotes.toscrape.com contains approximately 10 pages (https://quotes.toscrape.com/page/1/ through /page/10/) with 10 quotes per page, yielding 100+ total internal URLs. A Screaming Frog crawl would easily discover 10+ URLs. Verifier.py confirms this threshold (line 75). This is a reasonable and achievable minimum.

Web search confirmed Screaming Frog SEO Spider version 23.2 was released on December 16, 2025 as a bug fix release. Install script (line 44) specifies FROG_VERSION='23.2'. Screaming Frog CLI documentation confirms --headless, --crawl, --export-tabs, and --export-format flags are real and functional.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires crawling https://quotes.toscrape.com/, a real public website containing approximately 100 internal URLs across 10 pages (10 quotes per page), using Screaming Frog SEO Spider CLI v23.2 in headless mode. The target domain 'quotes.toscrape.com' will be found in crawl output. Output should be saved to /home/ga/Documents/SEO/cli_results as CSV export of the Internal:All tab. The expected minimum of 10 rows is well below the actual URL count (~100+), making successful completion highly achievable if the agent correctly constructs the command with --crawl, --headless, --output-folder, --export-tabs 'Internal:All', and --export-format csv flags.
